description_long: This house is a two-story Mediterranean-style residence set within a walled property featuring lush landscaping, a swimming pool, and multiple outdoor living spaces. The main building is constructed with light-colored stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, and large windows, some of which are floor-to-ceiling. The property includes a detached garage or guest house, manicured lawns, and a paved driveway. The front entryway is marked by a covered porch with columns and a wooden door, flanked by decorative shrubs and a low fence. The backyard features a pool, patio, and garden areas, with privacy provided by tall hedges and perimeter walls. Architectural details include balconies, pergolas, and climbing greenery that enhance the Mediterranean aesthetic.
description: A Mediterranean-style two-story house with stucco walls, terracotta roof tiles, large windows, and lush landscaping, including a pool and detached garage within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, manicured lawn, and a low fence with signage.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, large windows, covered patio, and detached garage or guest house.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, patio, and extensive garden space, with the main house and garage visible.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the driveway, garage, and side garden, with a clear view of the house's two stories and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some floor-to-ceiling panels
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wooden door, low steps, and decorative landscaping
